Employment

Home » About » Employment

MEI Schools is a growing, independent, Preschool-grade 12 school of over 1,400 students. All applicants must be dedicated to Christian education. Thank you for your interest in employment with us but please note that we have a strict policy on unsolicited resumes, and we will therefore not acknowledge them or retain them in our file. These positions of employment are directed, in the first instance, to Canadian citizens and those with Permanent Residence status. MEI Schools complies with the BC Human Rights Code and encourages all fully qualified candidates to apply.

The annual salary for each teacher position is determined by qualifications and experience for placement on the July 1, 2026, MEI Teacher Salary Grid. For the 2026-2027 school year, a full-time, BC Certified Teacher salary (with a certificate of qualification from the BC Ministry of Education and Childcare and with a university degree and a professional teacher education program) ranges from $69,050 to $113,295.

Please Note: Only short-listed candidates will be contacted.

Secondary School – Inclusive Education Teacher / Coordinator
Full-Time (1.0 FTE) Continuing (begins September 2nd, 2026)
